bloomForestGreenColor.note: bloom colour is green/near-foliage - a flower rendered as green foliage

zonesSingle.note: single-zone hardiness (usually a range in reality)

sizeStatisticalOutliers.note: beyond Q3+3*IQR or Q1-3*IQR within its category
examples: hosta-sum-and-substance [builtin/Perennial] matureSpread=1.5m (cat Q1-Q3 0.4-0.6) Sum and Substance

tagPunctuationCollisions.note: same tag spelled spaced vs hyphenated

foliageColorContradictions.note: 3D/preview renders default green while a tag names a coloured leaf
examples: ladys-mantle foliage=default-green but tags ["chartreuse"] - Lady's Mantle
